title: Carrier Buy Orders
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Commodity) AS orders FROM CarrierTradeOrder WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND PurchaseOrder > 0 AND (CancelTrade IS NULL OR CancelTrade = 0)
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Commodity_Localised, Commodity) AS Commodity, SUM(PurchaseOrder) AS Quantity, ROUND(AVG(Price), 2) AS 'Avg Price' FROM CarrierTradeOrder WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND PurchaseOrder > 0 AND (CancelTrade IS NULL OR CancelTrade = 0) GROUP BY Commodity, Commodity_Localised ORDER BY SUM(PurchaseOrder) DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {orders} commodities available for purchase on your carrier during the report period. Buy orders represent opportunities for visiting commanders to sell their cargo, driving commerce through your trading post.
details.help: CarrierTradeOrder fires when a trade order is listed. This aggregates all active buy orders by commodity to show trading volume and pricing.

tagLines: Carrier buy orders catalogued. Visiting traders brought their best commodities to sell.
Your carrier's shopping list compiled. Buyers found what they were looking for.
Purchase orders placed and fulfilled. Your carrier's economy thrived on commerce.
